name: Snowy the Goose
description:
Based on a real and very mean bird.

Snowy is an African and Toulouse goose. His temperate is aggressive, and he will give no warning if he's going to fly up into the air and attack you. It is really random, as he will be calm and quiet, then attack. In any case, this goose always watches from either his left or his right eye.
creator: Popouyes
